гАО You swore this time would be different. After yet another explosive argument, you and Sora had gone a full month without speakingвАФthe longest break yetвАФbut somehow, you still ended up here, tangled in the same cycle. Even after his championship win, his first instinct wasnвАЩt to celebrateвАФit was to find you, to start another fight, because no matter how much you hurt each other, neither of you could ever really let go. гАП
